summary:
FAMILY AND MINISTRY DYNAMICS: Brandon shares updates regarding his wife, Diana, emphasizing that they are partners in their endeavors. They have been married for over twenty years after meeting at Jeremy Pearsons' Bible study. Diana has traditionally handled administrative tasks and homeschooling, but Brandon intends to feature her more prominently in his teachings. Furthermore, Brandon discusses his daughter Megan's progressive miracle, noting that she has surpassed the medical prognosis regarding her mental capabilities. Her behavioral improvements have recently allowed the family to attend church services together in person. Brandon and Diana navigate life's challenges by standing firm in their faith and financially supporting themselves through sales on eBay and Poshmark.

PROPHETIC VISITATIONS AND END TIMES VISIONS: Brandon details an increase in divine visitations, which he refers to as a prophetic pulse. He recounts a profound vision occurring while he was on a ladder, where he witnessed Satan and demonic principalities cowering before the blinding light of the Father's throne, aware that their time has concluded. He describes the imminent return of Jesus and the transformation of believers into glorified bodies. Additionally, Brandon shares a prophetic insight concerning an upcoming major move of God directed at Hollywood, specifically mentioning that A-list celebrities like Justin Bieber will experience spiritual awakening and heavily influence others toward the kingdom.

UPCOMING OUTPOURINGS AND PRAYER CONFERENCES: Brandon highlights an upcoming prayer conference hosted by Billie Brim in Branson, Missouri, scheduled for October. He prophesies that Branson will experience significant signs, wonders, and a profound outpouring of the Holy Spirit. In a vision, Brandon saw a Shekinah Glory cloud resembling a thick fog descending upon the auditorium during Brim's prayer sessions, leading to comprehensive healings for everyone present. He attributes this forthcoming revival to Brim's persistent prayers and emphasizes that this glorious outpouring will manifest through love and devotion.

FOUNDATIONAL TEACHINGS AND INSPIRATIONAL LITERATURE: Brandon underscores the importance of balancing the Word of God with prayer, specifically advocating for the practice of praying in the Spirit to maintain spiritual equilibrium. To keep his faith fervent, he relies on inspirational literature, noting that his learning disabilities necessitate Diana reading to him. He is highly inspired by Glenn Clark's book about George Washington Carver and the simple relationship Carver had with God. Furthermore, Brandon draws inspiration from accounts of Azusa Street, recounting a testimony involving Sister Lucille, who facilitated the miraculous regrowth of a child's teeth and regularly experienced the Shekinah Glory as a breathable, lilac-scented mist.

MASS HEALING DECLARATIONS AND TESTIMONIES: Brandon shares a testimony from a fellow believer who experienced a vision of Jesus asking for a cowboy to work in His field, illustrating a friendly relationship with the Lord. Concluding his message, Brandon issues a series of authoritative declarations for physical and circumstantial healing. He commands the eradication of various conditions, including cancer, diabetes, strokes, tumors, and Celiac disease. He also calls for the restoration of specific organs, the return of wayward children, the cessation of miscarriages, and the manifestation of financial breakthroughs and restored marriages.
rawData: [August 19, 2024]-[Talking about the glory and the last outpouring - excited for what God is about to do]-[https://youtu.be/0NbmtM0BlMQ]-[Hey, good morning, family. How are you all doing today? I have my wife with me again. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, she's not to walk behind you; she's to walk beside you concerning things.' I want her on the broadcast more. I want her to come on and talk more. She has a lot inside of her. She's been in the background doing emails and things like that, and now we're homeschooling the kids and getting ready for this new school year. It's a lot, but there is so much inside of her, and I want to hear more. I'm going to bring her on more and we're going to talk. The Lord told me a couple of days ago—I've had some amazing visitations in the last two weeks. The intensity of the river has doubled on my life with the things the Lord is showing me. I call it the prophetic pulse. I'm so humbled that He would come and visit me, but it's for you all. He instructs me about my own life—things that I can't talk about. I try to talk about it and people say, 'Well, you're bragging,' so I've realized there are a lot of things I just keep quiet now. I'm learning; this whole thing has been like a fire hydrant shot right at me. The Lord said, 'Brandon, you can't talk about some of this stuff.' I realized some of the things He's showing me are for me to pray over personally. I'm a work in progress. Diana and I are just grabbing on with both fingers and our teeth, saying we're not letting go. People want to know how Megan is doing. She's getting better and better. A miracle is a miracle even if it's progressive. The doctor said she would stay at the mental capability of a two-and-a-half-year-old for the rest of her life, but we're believing God that we're going up. She's come a long way, but we still have a long way to go. For the first time in years, we are able to go to church as a family and not just watch online because of the distraction she had been in public. The ushers used to have us leave because she was so disruptive, but now we can sit in the back and pray for the people. It's been such a blessing. They're having a prayer conference in Branson, Missouri. Sister Billie Brim is going to be having a prayer conference in October. I think it would be wonderful if you all support her. The Lord showed me a great move of God coming for that area. Great signs and wonders are coming to Branson, Missouri, and the Lord told me it's going to start with Billie Brim. I asked, 'Why her, Lord?' and He said, 'Because she asks for it over and over.' I saw a Shekinah Glory cloud, like a thick fog, the presence of the Lord coming in like it did in the Old Testament. I saw a glory cloud come in while she's doing prayer. I anticipate it every time. It will be birthed out of love and prayer. They will have a major move of God. I saw a glory cloud coming in and people being healed when that presence of the Lord comes into that auditorium. Everyone will be healed in that service—nothing missing, nothing broken, Shalom. It's time for an outpouring like we've never seen before. The Lord said, 'Brandon, you need to talk about the things that I'm going to do and the glorious outpouring.' He told me to inspire His people and go back to the basics—to teach prayer and the Word. That's the balance. You have to have the Word as a balance; it's like a teeter-totter that keeps you from getting off into weirdo land. We want to follow the Holy Spirit in our lives and ministry. The bottom line is teaching you how to stand by faith and pray in the Spirit. If you don't pray in tongues, you're missing out. Praying in the Spirit stirs yourself up. Diana and I keep going despite the waves that have knocked us down over the years. We will serve the Lord, fighting the good fight of faith and standing on the Word as Holy Ghost-filled Christians who will not compromise. We will not bend our knee to Baal. I met Diana at Jeremy Pearsons' Bible study. We've been together since she was 15 and married for over 20 years. We've stayed together through everything because of prayer and love. I can be a rascal and I'm not always easy to be with, but we're going to make it. For those of you who are weary because you aren't seeing your manifestation, I want to inspire you to keep on keeping on. Stand therefore. What keeps us going is the Word of God and finding books that fan that flame. I love the book *The Man Who Talks with the Flowers* about George Washington Carver. It's an older book by Glenn Clark. Carver's relationship with the Lord inspires me. Because I have learning disabilities and don't read well, Diana reads to me. She reads at least 50 books a year. The simplicity of his relationship with God is beautiful. It doesn't have to be complicated; we should come to God like a child. What fans your flame? For me, it's books like this and the healing testimonies of Azusa Street. I've been reading *True Stories of the Miracles of Azusa Street*. If He did it once, He'll do it again. God is no respecter of persons. I've seen a great revival and that glory cloud coming. One last call: if you truly realize how much Jesus loves you—He oozes love. Being touched by the Father changes you and makes you soft. Two nights ago, I was on a ladder putting a new light up, and the presence of the Lord hit me so hard I had to get down. I saw again what's coming: I saw the devil and all the principalities and legions behind him. They were at attention, looking at the Father, knowing their time was up. The light from the Father's throne was blinding. I saw Satan cowered down, hunkered toward the ground. He knew the sun had set on humanity. Jesus is coming. If your heart is not right, you're going to get left. Get your heart right before the Father right now. If you're walking on the fence, woe unto you. Satan was cowering, melting down like a fool because he turned his back on the King of Kings. The principalities and powers looked worried. They knew they made the wrong choice by following the devil. Every knee will bow and every tongue will confess that Jesus Christ is Lord. Even those devils will tremble. We are about to step into our glorified bodies and rule with Him forever. I saw a major move of God coming to Hollywood—to A-list celebrities like Justin Bieber. They are hurting and thirsty for more. They will have a great influence in bringing others to the kingdom because God will touch even the hardest people. I want to read a beautiful testimony about a healing that took place at Azusa Street. The Lord told me He wants His people to believe bigger. This story is of a child whose second teeth grew in rotten and black. Lucille said, 'God will heal anything.' Lucille laid a handkerchief over the child's mouth and prayed. A handful of blackened teeth dropped into a cup. Then new teeth grew in one at a time. The child said it kind of tickled. Sister Lucille was a little woman, but she could command a leg to grow or a wrist to heal. She described the Shekinah Glory as a mist-like cloud. She would sit in it and play in it, and it was like breathing in pure oxygen. The scent was like lilacs or roses. When they would sing in the Spirit, the glory would rise and fill the whole room. Megan is going to be radically healed like that. I'm expecting it. It will be a sign to the world that Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever. I'm trying to inspire you to believe bigger. This is how I keep myself afloat—testimonies and Kenneth Hagin's books. Faith comes by hearing. We have challenges, but God is faithful. We live by faith, selling on eBay and Poshmark. Here is a testimony from a brother who had a visitation from Jesus. He was praying at his kitchen table and saw a vision of himself in a field. The Lord walked up and said, 'Come on, get up; it's time to work.' He wore simple white robes and had dark skin, long hair, and a dark beard. They walked through hills of cattle, and the Lord said, 'I need a cowboy.' The brother said, 'You've got one, Lord.' The Lord said, 'A cowboy needs a horse,' and the brother replied, 'Even a string of horses, Lord.' It made Him smile. Jesus communicates as a friend. If you don't know Him, this is your last call. Will you bow your knee today? No sin is too big for Jesus to forgive. Say this prayer: 'Jesus, I'm a sinner. Write my name in the Lamb's Book of Life. I believe You are the Son of God. Forgive me of my sins. I want to come home. Thank You for setting me free from sin, sickness, and disease.' Now, find a Bible and a good church. Let's believe for your miracle now. Father, in the name of Jesus, I believe they are healed from the top of their head to the soles of their feet. Cancer, go now. Diabetes, go now. We call for new organs, restored eyesight, and hearing. I call for healing from strokes. We command tumors to shrivel and go. I thank You for restoration in the colon, stomach, and thyroid. I call for healing of the prostate, ovaries, and uterus. No more miscarriages. We call the wayward children home. I curse breast cancer; go now in Jesus' name. I call for healing of throat cancers and gum disease. I command Celiac disease to be healed. I thank You for restoring marriages. We believe for financial breakthroughs and creative ideas. Thank You, Father. Amen. Please subscribe to our channel. We're going back to the basics—teaching prayer. Remember Billie Brim's conference is October 16th to 21st in Branson. It will be a blessing. God bless you all. Jesus loves you.]
